response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video to identify segments. The video starts with intro and member intros from 00:00-01:47, followed by a live performance of a song from 01:47 until the end at 05:00. 2. Identified the song from visual cues and concert information as 'ちょ～ゆめドデッカい！' (Chō~ Yume Dodekkai!) by Secret Society holoX. 3. Used the web search tool to find the full official Japanese lyrics for 'ちょ～ゆめドデッカい！'. 4. Verified the performers are the original artists (Secret Society holoX). 5. Constructed the final JSON with all necessary fields, including timestamps and full lyrics.
response.global_summary: A video segment featuring an energetic concert performance of the song 'Chō~ Yume Dodekkai!' by the VTuber group Secret Society holoX. The video begins with intro cinematics and member introductions before transitioning into the main song performance, which continues until the end of the video.

scenes.description: Intro cinematics and member introductions for the Secret Society holoX 'First Mission' live concert. No vocal song is being performed.
Main performance of the song 'Chō~ Yume Dodekkai!' by Secret Society holoX. The members sing and dance on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ある日、突如として現れた謎の組織“holoX”
構成員5名。与えられたミッションを達成すべく
今、立ち上がる！

ちょ～夢ドデッカい！　デッカい！
どこまでも　デッカい　デッカい
さあ行こう！おーいぇー！

本日のアジェンダです
(なんでござる～？)
KPIにコミットするファクトをオーサライズすることさ
(なにそれ！？)

ふぁ～徹夜明け　グロッキーです
(ふっか～つ！)
これじゃ統べる術無いようなもんですな
(はあ～)

日本中を駆け回って
このミッション遂行せねばならないらしい
ちょっと？　いや、結構不安です
それでも我らでやるしかない
皆のものかかれ！
いぇす　まい　だーく

ちょ～夢ドデッカい　デッカい！
手合わせて　デッカい　デッカい！
せーので急転直下！？
でも、やるっきゃない！
さあ、今征服宣言！

こんなに　ドデカっかい　デッカい！
希望乗せて　デッカい　デッカい！
さあ行こう！
5人合わせて　秘密結社 holoX　見参！
(でござる～)

てえてえはお預けです
いや、仲の良さは認めるけど、
統べるはエデンの星だから～！

さあ、作戦会議日和です！
(え～！？)

“らしさ”でいえば宇宙一なんですが…
(まず風呂入って？)

日本中のholoXer及び全人類を虜にしたのち
息合わせ　皆でまだ見ぬ場所まで
ドデカく誘うぜ！
(山田！)

ちょ～ド級！ゼッタイ　ゼッタイ！
海も超え　ゼッタイ　ゼッタイ！
せーので荒波でも乗るっきゃない！
期待の声が聞こえる
さぁ～いくぞ！

デッカい　デッカい！
不安捨てて　デッカい　デッカい！
さあ行こう！
ツワモノだって　怯まず立ち向かうぜ！

人生簡単にはうまくいかないけど…
我ら力を合わせれば
きっと行けるはず！
(いくぞ！)

ちょ～夢ドデッカい　デッカい！
手合わせて　デッカい　デッカい！
せーので急転直下！？
でも、やるっきゃない！
さあ、今征服宣言！
(はい！)

こんなに　ドデッカい　デッカい！
希望乗せて　デッカい　デッカい！
さあ行こう！
5人合わせて　秘密結社 holoX

待っていてね　みんなの為　見参！
(でござる～)",song_title:
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: One day, a mysterious organization 'holoX' suddenly appeared. 5 members. To achieve the given mission, they stand up now! Cho~ Yume Dodekkai! Dodekkai! Endless Dodekkai Dodekkai, let's go! Oh yeah! It's today's agenda (What is it, gozaru?). To authorize facts that commit to KPI (What is that!?). Phew~ All-nighter, groggy (Revived!). This doesn't seem to be a way to rule (Haa~). It seems we have to run all over Japan to carry out this mission. Wait? No, I'm quite anxious, but still, we have no choice but to do it ourselves. Everyone, attack! Yes, my dark. Cho~ Yume Dodekkai Dodekkai! Hands together Dodekkai Dodekkai! At the count of three, sudden change of fortune!? But, we have to do it! Now, the conquest declaration! So Dodekkai Dodekkai! Putting hope in Dodekkai Dodekkai! Let's go! 5 members together, Secret Society holoX arrival! (Gozaru~). Teetee is on hold. No, I admit we are close, but we rule the stars of Eden~! Now, it's a perfect day for a strategy meeting! (Eh~!?). If we talk about 'our style', we are the best in the universe... (First, take a bath?). After capturing holoXers and all mankind in Japan, let's catch our breath and invite everyone to a place they haven't seen yet in a Dodekkai way! (Yamada!). Cho~ D-Class! Absolutely absolutely! Crossing the sea absolutely absolutely! At the count of three, we have to ride even the rough waves! I can hear the voices of expectation. Let's go! Dodekkai Dodekkai! Throw away anxiety Dodekkai Dodekkai! Let's go! Even the brave ones will face it without fear! Life doesn't always go well easily... But if we combine our powers, we can surely make it! (Let's go!). Cho~ Yume Dodekkai Dodekkai! Hands together Dodekkai Dodekkai! At the count of three, sudden change of fortune!? But, we have to do it! Now, the conquest declaration! (Hai!). So Dodekkai Dodekkai! Putting hope in Dodekkai Dodekkai! Let's go! 5 members together, Secret Society holoX. Wait for us, for everyone, arrival! (Gozaru~).
